title: Device Home Screen - Unpair connected Headset
scenario: App correctly shows headset as disconnected after unpairing from phone's Bluetooth settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android phone.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired and connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, verify the headset is shown as connected.
4. Open the phone's system Settings → Bluetooth.
5. Find the connected Poly headset in the paired devices list.
6. Tap the gear/settings icon next to the headset name and select "Unpair" or "Forget" to remove the pairing.
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Observe the device status on the Home screen.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen should show the headset as disconnected (e.g., \"No device connected\" or similar disconnected state).
